PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q752138 .

  ?athlete wdt:P1694 ?time .
  ?athlete wdt:P155 ?place .
  FILTER(?time = "PT2H27M52S" ^^ xsd:duration)
}
